stage1_reason: All four commits involve block layer API changes: replacing direct queue access with bdev helpers, splitting secure erase from discard, removing QUEUE_FLAG_DISCARD, and adding bdev_write_cache. The driver diff shows migration from queue-based APIs (blk_queue_discard, test_bit(QUEUE_FLAG_WC), q->limits) to bdev-based APIs (bdev_max_discard_sectors, bdev_write_cache, bdev_discard_granularity).
stage2_reason: Driver commit 0000f2f7205d uses bdev_discard_alignment, which was moved out of line in kernel commit 5c4b4a5c6f11. This commit is part of the same series as 7b47ef52d0a2, 08e688fdb8f7, 44abff2c0b97, cf0fbf894bb5, 70200574cc22 that introduced the bdev helpers replacing queue-based APIs, directly matching the driver migration pattern.
